label: fallback-turn
page: lessons/01-hello-model/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: Give me John 3:16, word for word, in the King James Version.

message.content: And God so loved the world, that he gave his only-begotten Son; and whosoever shall believe on him should not perish but have eternal life: ForGod sent forth his Son into the world, that they might be saved through Him.
